import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Footer.css'; export default function Footer() { const [email, setEmail] = useState(''); const [subMsg, setSubMsg] = useState(''); const handleSubscribe = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (email) { setSubMsg('Thank you! We\'ll keep you posted.'); setEmail(''); } }; return (
